---
title: "Ellen Sophia Coleridge"
---

## Ellen Sophia Coleridge

**Dates:** (1816/7-1885)

**Maiden name:** (Patteson)

### Description

second wife of the Rev. Edwin Coleridge

### Biography

According to the marriage announcement <i>Hampshire Telegraph</i> 13 July 1841, she was the daughter of H. Patteson Esq. of Woburn Place.  She may have been related to Sir John Patteson (who married her husband’s first cousin Frances Duke Coleridge in 1824) but she wasn’t his sister.

### Letters

- Letter from November 4, 1867

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
